## omqctl queue create

Create a new queue

### Synopsis

The 'queue create' command creates a new queue with the specified name and options.

```
omqctl queue create <name> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for create
      --max-size uint32     Maximum queue size (0 = unlimited)
      --priorities uint32   Number of priority levels (default 1)
```
